nasb.text: He found him in a desert land, And in the howling waste of a wilderness; He encircled him, He cared for him, He guarded him as the pupil of His eye.

esv.text: “He found him in a desert land, and in the howling waste of the wilderness; he encircled him, he cared for him, he kept him as the apple of his eye.

cnv.text: 耶和華在曠野之地遇見了他， 在荒涼之地和野獸吼叫的荒野，遇見了他， 就環繞他，看顧他， 保護他，好像保護自己眼中的瞳人一樣。

ccb.text: “在荒凉的旷野， 在野兽吼叫的荒野， 耶和华找到他们， 庇护他们，看顾他们， 保护他们如同保护眼中的瞳仁，
